tasks.subject: Task 0: CLI Spike — Verify claude flags and session ID capture
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Determine exact `claude` CLI flags for resuming sessions and injecting system prompts, and discover how to capture a session's ID after first spawn.

**Files:**
- Create: `docs/nova-cli-spike.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Exact flag for resuming a prior session is documented
- [ ] Exact flag for system prompt injection is documented
- [ ] Session ID capture mechanism is documented
- [ ] Fallback approach documented if flags don't exist

**Verify:** `docs/nova-cli-spike.md` exists with findings

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/nova-cli-spike.md"], "verifyCommand": "test -f docs/nova-cli-spike.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Exact resume flag documented", "System prompt flag documented", "Session ID capture mechanism documented"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Project Scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Working Go module with config loading, minimal main.go, justfile, and service file.

**Files:**
- Create: `go.mod`, `config/config.go`, `config/config_test.go`, `main.go`, `justfile`, `nova.service`, `.gitignore`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `go test ./config/...` passes
- [ ] `go build .` produces a `nova` binary
- [ ] Config loads TOML with correct defaults
- [ ] Bot refuses to start with empty `bot_token`

**Verify:** `go test ./config/... -v` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["go.mod", "config/config.go", "config/config_test.go", "main.go", "justfile", "nova.service", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./config/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["go test ./config/... passes", "go build . succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: SQLite Store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Database layer with schema migrations and full CRUD for sessions, swarms, and messages.

**Files:**
- Create: `nova/db/db.go`, `nova/db/db_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `go test ./nova/db/... -v` passes
- [ ] Sessions CRUD works
- [ ] Swarms CRUD works
- [ ] ResetActiveSessions sets hot→cold
- [ ] Messages can be inserted and counted

**Verify:** `go test ./nova/db/... -v` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nova/db/db.go", "nova/db/db_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./nova/db/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All DB tests pass", "ResetActiveSessions works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Directive Parser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Package that parses single-line JSON directives from Claude's stdout.

**Files:**
- Create: `nova/directive/directive.go`, `nova/directive/directive_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All directive types parse correctly
- [ ] Non-JSON lines return nil, nil
- [ ] Malformed JSON returns error

**Verify:** `go test ./nova/directive/... -v` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nova/directive/directive.go", "nova/directive/directive_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./nova/directive/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All parse tests pass", "nil returned for non-JSON", "Error returned for malformed JSON"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Discord Client Interface, Helpers, and Test Stub
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Client interface, channel/category helpers, and testdiscord stub.

**Files:**
- Create: `nova/discord/discord.go`, `nova/discord/discord_test.go`, `internal/testdiscord/testdiscord.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] EnsureCategory is idempotent
- [ ] EnsureChannel is idempotent
- [ ] ArchiveChannel renames with ✓- prefix
- [ ] PostMessage splits at 2000 chars

**Verify:** `go test ./nova/discord/... -v` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nova/discord/discord.go", "nova/discord/discord_test.go", "internal/testdiscord/testdiscord.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./nova/discord/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EnsureCategory idempotent", "ArchiveChannel renames correctly", "PostMessage splits at 2000 chars"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Session Subprocess
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Session struct with hot/cold state machine, subprocess I/O goroutines, and idle timer.

**Files:**
- Create: `nova/session/session.go`, `nova/session/session_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Warm starts subprocess, status becomes hot
- [ ] Send delivers messages to stdin
- [ ] Responses accumulate until done sentinel
- [ ] Directives intercepted, not posted to Discord
- [ ] Idle timer fires OnIdle
- [ ] Terminate stops subprocess

**Verify:** `go test ./nova/session/... -v` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nova/session/session.go", "nova/session/session_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./nova/session/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Warm transitions to hot", "Send works", "Directives intercepted", "Idle timer fires", "Terminate works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Session Manager
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Manager owning the session map, handling spawn/kill/resume and directive routing.

**Files:**
- Create: `nova/session/manager.go`, `nova/session/manager_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Spawn creates workspace, channel, DB record, subprocess
- [ ] Kill terminates and archives
- [ ] ByChannel routes correctly
- [ ] WarmIfCold warms cold sessions
- [ ] Claude session ID captured and stored in DB

**Verify:** `go test ./nova/session/... -v` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nova/session/manager.go", "nova/session/manager_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./nova/session/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Spawn creates all resources", "Kill terminates and archives", "ByChannel works", "Session ID captured"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Swarm Manager
tasks.description:
**Goal:** swarm.Manager for create, dissolve, and broadcast.

**Files:**
- Create: `nova/swarm/swarm.go`, `nova/swarm/swarm_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Create inserts DB record and Discord category
- [ ] Duplicate name returns error
- [ ] Broadcast sends to all sessions in swarm
- [ ] Dissolve kills all sessions

**Verify:** `go test ./nova/swarm/... -v` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nova/swarm/swarm.go", "nova/swarm/swarm_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./nova/swarm/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Create works", "Duplicate name errors", "Broadcast sends to all", "Dissolve kills all"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Discord Message Routing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Route non-bot messages in session channels to session stdin.

**Files:**
- Create: `nova/nova/nova.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Bot messages ignored
- [ ] Non-session channels ignored
- [ ] Session channel messages delivered to session

**Verify:** `go build ./...` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nova/nova/nova.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Bot messages ignored", "Session messages routed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Slash Commands
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register /nova command tree and implement all interaction handlers.

**Files:**
- Create: `nova/nova/commands/commands.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] /nova spawn creates session
- [ ] /nova list shows sessions
- [ ] /nova kill terminates
- [ ] /nova resume warms session
- [ ] /nova status shows detail
- [ ] /nova clean removes workspaces
- [ ] /nova swarm create/dissolve work
- [ ] /nova broadcast sends to swarm

**Verify:** `go build ./...` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nova/nova/commands/commands.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All /nova subcommands registered", "Handlers compile without error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Bot Wiring and Startup Sequence
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Complete nova.go coordinator and main.go with full startup sequence.

**Files:**
- Modify: `nova/nova/nova.go`
- Modify: `main.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] go build . produces working binary
- [ ] Bot refuses to start with empty bot_token or guild_id
- [ ] System prompt written on startup
- [ ] Control channel and categories ensured
- [ ] go test ./... passes

**Verify:** `go build . && go test ./... -v` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nova/nova/nova.go", "main.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build . && go test ./... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Binary builds", "All tests pass", "Startup sequence complete"]}
```
